details: Type-1 sweep + Reg A/B/C verification, branch astancov/eltwise_run7_refined HEAD 7060e1245a3

D8 invariant strict-grep clean (1 wrapper site at chain.inl:1254). Reg A confirmed: BinaryFpu uses init_with_operands short-init, UnaryBcast keeps unary_bcast_init BIG init. Reg C confirmed: hoisted_init_for_each PackTile guard removed. Reg B confirmed: moreh_sum.cpp:19 + moreh_norm.cpp:22+39 use logical_shape().rank(). Q4 deepseek add_bias raw, softmax_backward Pinned
test_eltwise.py 453P/7S — helper baseline preserved through Reg A+C fixes
24F/69P/32S — matches documented pre-existing failure class (large_algorithm_for_dim_hw, for_dim_nc, backward variants)
13F/57P/60S — all 13 fails are fp32_dest_acc_en=True reduction=mean+sum, matches documented pre-existing class
132P/128S — Reg C PackTile reconfig fix delivered, 0 fails (was 66F)
norm 466P/1806S, sum 227P/155S — Reg B host fix verified
24P — UnaryBcast Reg A revert to BIG init verified (bcast_to relies on this as implicit boot)

Sweep-introduced fp32_dest_acc_en=True regression class — softmax +8F, logsoftmax +18F, logsoftmax_ulp +36F (all -inf overflow), nll_loss +3F, nll_loss_unreduced +3F. Pre-sweep baseline d1d1f9246c5 vs current HEAD.

Sweep migration of exp_tile_to_cb/rexp_tile_to_cb/log_tile_to_cb/recip_tile_to_cb (Commit 4, T1.11-T1.16) dropped _with_dt CB-format-aware reconfig. New moreh_unary_chain uses bare CopyTile+Sfpu+PackTile without CopyTileReconfig::Input, PackTileReconfig::Output, or EnableFp32DestAcc=true. fp32_dest_acc_en=True path produces -inf.
Pre-sweep d1d1f9246c5..HEAD: +828/-452 = +376 net (vs design v6 projection -482/+311 = -171 net) — sweep added more code than projected

verification_report.md (Section 2 sweep verification appended, YELLOW verdict), changelog.md (Type-1 sweep block appended), capabilities.md (Reg A/C state added). All target paths under ttnn/cpp/ttnn/kernel_lib/agents/.
